returns.funcs: The function selectors implemented by the facet.

returns.interfaces: The interface IDs implemented by the facet.

facetMetadata().details: Exposed to allow for single call retrieval of all facet metadata.

returns.functions: The function selectors implemented by the facet.
returns.interfaces: The interface IDs implemented by the facet.

initialize(address,address,address[],uin.details: Seeds the pool, calculates invariant, and mints BPT to the recipient.

params.tokens: Tokens in the same order as registration

registerPool(address,(address,uint8,addr.details: Called by pool factory during pool creation.

params.pauseWindowEndTime: When the pool's pause window ends
params.poolHooksContract: Hooks contract address (address(0) if no hooks)
params.protocolFeeExempt: Whether pool is exempt from protocol fees
params.roleAccounts: Addresses for pause manager, swap fee manager, pool creator

facetFuncs().notice: Declares the function selectors implemented by the exposing facet for use in a composing proxy.

facetInterfaces().notice: Declares the interfaces implemented by the exposing facet for use in a composing proxy.

facetMetadata().notice: Declares comprehensive metadata about the exposing facet.

facetName().notice: Declares a canonical nonunique name for the exposing facet.

initialize(address,address,address[],uin.notice: Initializes a registered pool with initial liquidity.

registerPool(address,(address,uint8,addr.notice: Registers a new pool with the vault.
